must_detect.matched_text: Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of PT Arunika DPT Teknologi by PT Sawala Dana Nusa Tbk (listed on Bursa Efek Samudra: SDNT), non-binding except as to confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law (Indonesia).

Overview: Buyer to acquire 80% of the issued shares of Target to integrate a licensed DPT (aset kripto) wallet and a climate-credit marketplace module into Buyer’s fintech ecosystem, subject to approvals from Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Nusantara (OJN) and Badan Pengawas Aset Digital Nusantara (BPADIN), and customary competition clearance.

Consideration: IDR 420,000,000,000 cash at closing plus an earn-out of up to IDR 60,000,000,000 over 24 months tied to (i) monthly active verified DPT wallet users and (ii) volume of verified carbon unit trades on Target’s module, with caps and KPI definitions to be agreed.

Employment and retention: Closing is conditioned on retention agreements with key managers, including Bapak Aditya Wirawan (CTO) and Ibu Nabila Aryasari (Head of Compliance), with 24‑month stay bonuses and IP/assignment covenants; no change-in-control payment will exceed agreed caps without Buyer consent.

MAC/termination: Buyer may terminate if (i) BPADIN suspends or revokes Target’s DPT registration, (ii) any verifier invalidates >10% of listed climate units, or (iii) any additional cyber breach compromises >100,000 data subjects or critical signing keys prior to closing.

Financing and exclusivity: Buyer will fund in cash from internal resources and a committed revolving facility; Seller grants 60 days exclusivity, during which Seller shall not solicit or entertain competing proposals nor disclose deal-stage information beyond clean team protocols.

Confidentiality and data handling: All non-public information is MNPI and will be processed in compliance with UU PDP principles; no KTP numbers or unmasked credential data will be uploaded to the data room, and personal data will be minimized, encrypted at rest, and deleted per the retention schedule after closing lapses or termination.

Closing and timing: Target signing in 45 days and closing within 30 days thereafter subject to CP satisfaction; parties will coordinate board memo workflows for approvals and pre-clear press lines with OJN staff as needed through permitted channels without revealing MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Refers to MAC concept but does not use the exact allowed phrases (Material Adverse Change/Effect or 'MAC clause').
Indicates data deletion/retention controls, but no explicit allowed rule exists for retention.
References material non-public information but not tied to a specific allowed rule token.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: ID Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ID Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect remains a broader gap-discovery tier, not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: ID Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
